name: Flywire Global Payment Platform API
what_it_does: Flywire global payment platform REST API for education institutions, healthcare providers, and B2B companies to accept and reconcile large, complex international payments with currency optimization and payer experience management. Enables AI agents to manage international tuition and enrollment fee collection for higher education payment automation, handle patient payment and healthcare receivables for medical billing payment automation, access B2B accounts receivable payment acceptance for cross-border invoice payment automation, retrieve multi-currency payment processing with real-time FX rates for currency management automation, manage payer verification and KYC for payment compliance automation, handle payment reconciliation and ERP posting for financial operations automation, access payment plan and installment management for flexible payment automation, retrieve payer communication and payment status notification for receivables management automation, manage refund and payment reversal processing for payment operations automation, and integrate Flywire with student information systems (SIS), EHR, and ERP for end-to-end large payment reconciliation.
use_cases: Collecting tuition payments from international student payment agents
Processing patient payments from healthcare billing agents
Accepting B2B invoices from cross-border AR collection agents
Reconciling multi-currency payments from ERP integration agents
not_for: High-frequency small-value consumer payments (use Stripe or Square)
SMB merchant payment processing (Flywire targets large organizations)
best_when: A university, hospital, or B2B company wanting AI agents to automate international large-value payment collection, multi-currency reconciliation, and payer communication within Flywire's global payment platform.
avoid_when: OFAC AND SANCTIONS SCREENING FOR INTERNATIONAL PAYMENTS: Flywire processes international payments from countries with complex sanctions profiles; automated payment acceptance must account for OFAC sanctions screening; automated payment from sanctioned country or sanctioned individual creates OFAC violation regardless of educational or healthcare purpose. STUDENT FINANCIAL AID INTERACTION WITH TUITION PAYMENT: Flywire tuition payment must be reconciled with financial aid credits in student information system; automated tuition payment posting without SIS financial aid integration creates double-posting of tuition amount; implement SIS integration to account for aid credits before automated payment amount calculation. GDPR AND FERPA FOR INTERNATIONAL STUDENT PAYMENT DATA: International student tuition payment data is subject to both GDPR (EU students) and FERPA (US university education records); automated payment data retention and sharing must comply with both regulatory frameworks; automated payment analytics using student payment data requires FERPA release or exception analysis.

auth.notes: Flywire uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for integrations. REST API with JSON. Boston, Massachusetts HQ. Founded 2009 by Iker Marcaide. Public (NASDAQ: FLYW). Products: Education payments, Healthcare payments, Travel payments, B2B payments. 3,000+ clients in 240+ countries. Multi-currency (140+ currencies). FX optimization and currency conversion. PCI DSS Level 1. GDPR. SOC2. Integration with 75+ SIS, EHR, and ERP systems. Competes with TouchNet (Heartland), CashNet (Heartland), and PayMyTuition for education payments; Simplee and Patientco for healthcare payments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — per-transaction fee or volume-based pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-transaction percentage fee; volume discounts; enterprise custom pricing for large institutions
pricing.notes: Boston MA. Public (NASDAQ: FLYW). Per-transaction fee. Enterprise pricing. 3,000+ institutional clients. No free tier.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API client; payment and reconciliation queries throttled; webhooks for payment receipt, status change, and refund events

known_agent_gotchas: FX RATE LOCK WINDOW FOR PAYMENT COMPLETION: Flywire FX rates are locked for a specific window when payer initiates payment; automated payment workflows must complete within FX rate lock window; automated payment processing that exceeds rate lock window creates rate expiry requiring payer to restart with new rate; design automated payment flows to complete within typical rate lock duration (24-72 hours)

SIS STUDENT ID MATCHING FOR PAYMENT RECONCILIATION: Flywire tuition payment reconciliation depends on correct student ID matching; automated payment posting to SIS must use Flywire's student identifier format matching SIS student record; automated reconciliation with mismatched student ID format creates unmatched payment requiring manual reconciliation

PAYMENT PLAN INSTALLMENT FAILURE HANDLING: Flywire payment plan installments may fail on scheduled charge date; automated installment management must handle failed installment events via webhook and implement retry or alternative payment method collection; automated payment plan with no failure handling creates delinquent installment without notification

CURRENCY ROUTING FOR HIGH-INFLATION COUNTRIES: Flywire payer currency routing for countries with high inflation or currency controls may route through alternative currencies; automated payment amount calculation in local currency may not map directly to USD settlement amount; design payment amount communication with currency conversion clarity for payers from high-inflation markets

REFUND PROCESSING TIMING FOR ORIGINAL PAYMENT METHOD: Flywire refunds return to original payment method with varying processing times by method (wire 5-7 days, card 3-5 days); automated refund workflows that commit to same-day refund create customer expectation misalignment; implement payment method-specific refund timeline communication in automated refund workflows
agent_readiness.security_notes: Global payment platform. PCI-DSS Level 1, SOC2, GDPR, OFAC. API key + OAuth. US/EU/UK. International payment and payer financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Global payments. PCI-DSS L1, SOC2, GDPR, OFAC. API key + OAuth. US/EU/UK. International payment data.
